title: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project and Third Impa
display_title: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project and Third Impa
wikitext:
[]: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project & Third Impa             Quote Post by ikari » Sun Jan 09, 2011 12:04 pm I am still curious about Human Instrumentality Project / HIP (Human Complementing Project) and 3rd Impact ? I have many question about it and please tell me if you know. 1. Are they the same thing ? 2. What's the purpose of HIP ? 3. Angels attack Nerv HQ to get united with Lilith that can cause 3rd impact. while from what I know, when HIP happened, seems also like 3rd impact to me. Why should wait for all angels to be defeated if the result just the same Why don't just progress the HIP before the angels come. 4. What happened in eps 25-26 and End of Evangelion. are the same thing? because a friend told me that in eps 25-26 HIP was completed, it was seen when people around Shinji claps for Shinji. while in EoE Shinji rejected the HIP. which one is correct ? or do you have different opinion ? 5. In EoE why did only Asuka didn't release her AT field ? is it because she was in EVA ?or is there any other explanation ?

[]: Re: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project & Third             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Jan 09, 2011 12:37 pm ikari wrote: I am still curious about Human Instrumentality Project / HIP (Human Complementing Project) and 3rd Impact ? I have many question about it and please tell me if you know. 1. Are they the same thing ? 2. What's the purpose of HIP ?

[]: Re: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project & Third             Quote Post by The Forgotten Knight » Sun Jan 09, 2011 2:03 pm Major Spoilers This is from my understanding. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Help Me About Human Instrumentality Project & Third             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Jan 09, 2011 2:16 pm ikari wrote: 1. Are they the same thing ?

[]:             Quote Post by ikari » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:46 pm well okay, different explanations...but thanks I thought Asuka wasn't die, was she? She showed up at the end of EoE. Why is that ? And who is SEELE for wanting to create an HIP ? Are they like crazy suffering people who doesnt want to live anymore ?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:59 pm ikari wrote: well okay, different explanations...but thanks I thought Asuka wasn't die, was she? She showed up at the end of EoE. Why is that ?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jan 10, 2011 3:58 pm SEELE is basically a religious cult. They want to end all suffering, and also think that merging everyone into one will reunite us with God.

[]:             Quote Post by Badonkadonk » Mon Jan 10, 2011 5:20 pm The version of Third Impact that an Angel coming into contact with Adam would cause and the version that a human organization would intentionally bring about are not the same. Here it is as I understand it: During Second Impact, Adam broadcast an Anti-A.T. Field which separated the souls from every human body for several miles. With no place to go, all of those souls were left to wander in all directions aimlessly through space. The point of a human-enacted Third Impact is to recreate this event on a global scale, while excavating the Black Moon as a point to which all of the souls would be drawn together. Because an Angel-enacted Third Impact would not include the excavation of the Black Moon, the souls of all humans would just drift aimlessly through space, which can hardly be seen as a constructive change. The term "Third Impact" refers to the broadcast of a global Anti-A.T. Field, and so isn't necessarily an explosion (while the excavation of the Black Moon involved a large explosion and the union of an Angel with Adam would probably result in some release of energy, the explosion isn't the point.). Have you ever downloaded a RAR archive with some corrupted parts, then downloaded it again to find that different parts were corrupted, and then merged them to make one complete archive? That's Human Instrumentality.
